narrative.headline: 2022 Nissan Altima: forward collision avoidance leads owner complaints
narrative.summary: Owners filed 20 complaints with NHTSA. Forward collision avoidance is the most reported area at 35%, followed by the electrical system and engine (25% each) and the brakes (20%). No deaths are reported. The air bags draw the fewest complaints (3) but every one of them involved a crash and an injury, so they are worth a close look.

issues.title: Forward Collision Avoidance
issues.blurb: The top complaint area: 7 reports (35%), including 1 with fire. No crashes or injuries reported here, but it is the most common owner concern.

issues.title: Air Bags
issues.blurb: Fewest complaints (3, 15%) but the most serious by outcome: all 3 involved a crash and an injury. Take this one seriously.
